description_long: This object is a Kalashnikov-style assault rifle, featuring a combination of dark metal and polished wood components. The stock, handguard, and pistol grip are made of wood with a reddish-brown finish, while the receiver, barrel, and magazine are constructed from matte black metal. The rifle has a curved detachable box magazine, a prominent front sight post, and a slanted muzzle device at the end of the barrel. The top of the receiver is flat, with a rear iron sight mounted near the back. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with visible screws and rivets securing the various parts. The rifle's proportions and details suggest it is modeled after the iconic AK-47 or a similar variant.
description: A Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved magazine. The design is robust, featuring iron sights and a slanted muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Front view showing the barrel, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden components and the magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the alignment of the barrel, receiver, and the iron sights.
